features.summaryKey: Capture a photo and get AI-powered posture scoring with plumb-line overlay, symmetry comparison, trend tracking, and PDF reports.
Start your day with a personalized dashboard card summarizing your condition, sleep, and today's training plan.
Track your RPE trend over time with a moving average chart, and receive coaching alerts when overtraining patterns emerge.
Explore muscle recovery on a fullscreen RealityKit viewer with the Z-Anatomy model for smoother, more detailed visualization.
Reorder exercises mid-workout on Apple Watch — rearrange your session on the fly from your wrist.
See how your condition changes throughout the day with hourly HRV and heart rate charts.
Get a smart nudge on your dashboard when it's time to create a workout template from your recent sessions.
